Package cz.cvut.fel.omo.factory

Class DeviceFactory

java.lang.Object
cz.cvut.fel.omo.factory.DeviceFactory
public class DeviceFactory
extends java.lang.Object
This class is factory for devices.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Oľga Ostashchuk, Tereza Lodrová, Michal Pechník

  • Method Details

    • createCoffeeMaker

      public CoffeeMaker createCoffeeMaker​(int elPerACTIVE, int elPerIDLE, int waterPerACTIVE, int waterPerIDLE)
      Creates CofeeMaker with given parameters.
      Parameters:
      elPerACTIVE - Represents consumption of electricity in Active state
      elPerIDLE - Represents consumption of electricity in Idle state
      waterPerACTIVE - Represents consumption of water in Active state
      waterPerIDLE - Represents consumption of water in Idle state

    • createDishwasher

      public Dishwasher createDishwasher​(int elPerACTIVE, int elPerIDLE, int waterPerACTIVE, int waterPerIDLE)
      Creates Dishwasher with given parameters.
      Parameters:
      elPerACTIVE - Represents consumption of electricity in Active state
      elPerIDLE - Represents consumption of electricity in Idle state
      waterPerACTIVE - Represents consumption of water in Active state
      waterPerIDLE - Represents consumption of water in Idle state

      Creates Fridge with given parameters.
      Parameters:
      elPerACTIVE - Represents consumption of electricity in Active state
      elPerIDLE - Represents consumption of electricity in Idle state
      waterPerACTIVE - Represents consumption of water in Active state
      waterPerIDLE - Represents consumption of water in Idle state
